title: ManePear Overlay
description: A clean, PvP-focused texture pack made for better visibility and smoother fights in SMPs and duels, inspired by ManePear with full credits to used pack creators.
body:
# Manepear Overlay
This texture pack gives Minecraft a clean, PvP-focused look with better visibility and a smoother feel in fights—perfect for SMP PvP, duels, and grinding. It was inspired by the YouTuber **ManePear**, and I created my own version using elements from **other packs**, with **full credits given** to their **creators**.
- This is all from **Manepear’s** content; I tried my best to **recreate it fully**.

## Compatibility
- Tested on: 1.21.5 – 1.20.6 (Main version: 1.21+)
- Other versions: Not tested

## Requirements
- **No mods required**, this pack works on vanilla Minecraft.

## Credits
- Pack created by **[_Melted](https://modrinth.com/user/_Melted)**.
- Some parts were taken from **[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)**.
- Some parts of the Low Shield were taken from **[Shield Corrections](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shield-corrections)**.
- Inspired by **[Manepear](https://www.youtube.com/@ManePear)**.
